blockers.description: agent-browser infrastructure failure: Chromium headless shell requires system library libatk-1.0.so.0 (ATK accessibility toolkit) which is not installed on the host system
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted: 1) agent-browser install, 2) agent-browser install --with-deps, 3) npx playwright install-deps chromium. All failed because sudo is required and not available in the execution environment.
blockers.errorDetails: /home/riz/.cache/ms-playwright/chromium_headless_shell-1208/chrome-headless-shell-linux64/chrome-headless-shell: error while loading shared libraries: libatk-1.0.so.0: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory

summary: All 3 assertions (VAL-ASSESS-001, VAL-ASSESS-002, VAL-UI-001) are blocked due to browser automation infrastructure failure. The Chromium browser requires system-level GTK/ATK libraries that are not installed and cannot be installed without root access.
